data.title: ALLIES to host Governor Newsom and Minister-President Rhein at Munich Security Conference for global security discussions.
data.description: On February 13, 2026, in Los Angeles, the Alliance for Local Leaders International (ALLIES) is set to emphasize the importance of local leadership in global security talks at the Munich Security Conference, led by Founder & CEO Ambassador (ret.) Nina Hachigian. The conference will gather influential figures and experts to discuss pressing security issues, highlighting the pivotal role of local leaders.

data.title: PCS Edventures! had revenue of $754,889 in Q3 of FY 2026, up 7.7% from the previous year, with a gross margin of 64.2%.
data.description: In Meridian, Idaho, on February 13, 2026, PCS Edventures!, Inc. ("PCSV"), a top provider of TK-12 Science, Technology, Engineering, and Mathematics ("STEM") education programs, shared its third quarter fiscal results ending on December 31, 2025. During this period, revenue rose by 7.7% to $754,889 compared to the previous year. The gross margin also improved to 64.2% from 50.3% in the same quarter of FY 2025. The net income before income tax provision was ($0.3 million) in the third quarter of FY 2026, an improvement from ($0.4 million) in the same quarter of the prior year. The company bought back 379,270 shares of its common stock during the quarter. President Mike J. Bledsoe noted that despite December 31st being the slowest revenue quarter, it indicated market stabilization after a turbulent 2025. For further details, the complete story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: TV series on New Orleans real estate and lifestyle, hosted by Shearman, Liuzza, and McCoy, showcases local people and businesses. (Characters: 114)
data.description: In New Orleans, a new series featuring Garrett Shearman, Vince Liuzza, and John McCoy is being locally produced to showcase the individuals, communities, and enterprises that characterize the city. The series is set to premiere on REAL Shows Network (RSN), a television platform specializing in real estate, on February 13, 2026. This initiative aims to highlight the essence of New Orleans through insightful storytelling and engaging content. Stay tuned for an in-depth exploration of the city's unique culture and vibrant landscape.

data.title: Chesapeake Utilities Corp to provide natural gas service for new Sussex Tech High School in Delaware, largest school constrctn project.
data.description: In Dover, Delaware, the Sussex County Vocational Technical School District is gearing up for its largest school construction project yet. Chesapeake Utilities Corporation (NYSE: CPK) is teaming up with SCVTSD to introduce natural gas service to support the energy needs of the development. This initiative comes as part of efforts to enhance infrastructure and meet the growing demands of the district. Stay tuned for updates on this significant project in the coming months.

data.title: Dorsia introduces Culture Calendar during Mexico City Art Week at Sol a Sol. New destination for events. NY, Feb. 13, 2026.
data.description: Dorsia has introduced a groundbreaking location for exclusive events worldwide, tailored to the lifestyle and travel preferences of its members. This one-of-a-kind destination offers easy access and seamless organization for the most sought-after gatherings. The initiative, led by Dorsia, sets a new standard in event hosting. The announcement was made in New York on Feb. 13, 2026. For images, please refer to Rodrigo Gaya's photo credits.

data.title: Lilac Biosciences and Soin Neuroscience collaborate to study RNA in pain & neuromodulation. Spin-off from Brown Uni.
data.description: In a recent press release on February 13, 2026, it was revealed that Lilac Biosciences, a biotechnology firm stemming from the Giuliani RNA Center at Brown University in Providence, R.I., is in the process of creating quantitative RNA-focused analytical instruments. Their latest development involves a research partnership with Soin Neuroscience, a Dayton, Ohio-based company specializing in innovative neurological solutions. This collaboration aims to combine their expertise to advance the field of RNA research further. The specific details of the collaboration and the goals have not been disclosed yet.

data.title: Supermicro (Nasdaq: SMCI) to attend investor events: Morgan Stanley Conference on March 2, 2026 & Keybanc Summit on March 3, 2026 in San Francisco.
data.description: Super Micro Computer, Inc., traded on Nasdaq as SMCI, has disclosed its involvement in three investor conferences. The upcoming events include the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference scheduled for March 2, 2026, in San Francisco, CA, featuring one-on-one meetings. They will also be attending the Keybanc Emerging Technology Summit on March 3, 2026, in San Francisco, with a similar format of one-on-one meetings. Furthermore, the company will participate in Loop Capital Markets 7th Annual Investor Conference, the date and location of which are yet to be disclosed. Super Micro Computer, Inc. positions itself as a Total IT Solution Provider catering to various sectors such as AI/ML, HPC, Cloud, Storage, and 5G/Edge.

data.title: XRP co-creator dismisses Bitcoin as 'technological dead end', cites lack of innovation. Schwartz argues its success lies elsewhere.
data.description: Ripple's former CTO, David Schwartz, labeled Bitcoin as a "technological dead end" while XRP is in a consolidation phase following a recovery from lows of $1.15. Addressing a query about returning to work on Bitcoin after co-developing the XRP Ledger, Schwartz expressed disinterest, likening Bitcoin to the dollar as both being technological dead ends. He pointed out that Bitcoin's success does not hinge on blockchain advancements, stating that its usability and transferability are what investors truly value. Schwartz emphasized that the blockchain layer's technology does not play a significant role in Bitcoin's success. The full article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Republic Technologies Inc. is offering up to 14,087,000 special warrants for US$0.21/C$0.29 each, aiming to raise US$3.0 million.
data.description: Republic Technologies Inc. based in Vancouver, BC, is excited to reveal a non-brokered private placement offering of a maximum of 14,087,000 special warrants, priced at US$0.21/C$0.29 per Special Warrant, aiming for total gross proceeds reaching US$3.0 million. Each Special Warrant is set to convert into one common share automatically. The Company is represented by various stock symbols including CSE: DOCT, FSE: 7FM0, WKN: A41AYF, and OTCQB: DOCKF.

data.title: FedEx Corp. to pay $1.45 per share dividend on April 1, 2026, for stockholders as of March 9, 2026.
data.description: The Board of Directors of FedEx Corp. (NYSE: FDX) has announced a quarterly cash dividend of $1.45 per share on FedEx Corp. common stock. The dividend is set to be paid on April 1, 2026, to stockholders of record as of March 9, 2026. FedEx Corp. (NYSE: FDX) offers a wide range of transportation, e-commerce, and business services to customers globally, emphasizing its commitment to enhancing stockholder value.

data.title: UGG unveils Spring 2026 campaign with new clogs/mules, featuring stars Central Cee & Su Yiming.
data.description: In Santa Barbara, California, the popular lifestyle brand UGG® (part of Deckers Brands [NYSE: DECK]) has launched its latest collection of clogs and mules for Spring 2026. The new line draws inspiration from the beloved UGG® Tasman, introducing fresh silhouettes and styles. To promote the upcoming release, UGG® has enlisted global rap star Central Cee and Olympic snowboarding gold medalist Su Yiming as the featured personalities in the campaign. This collaboration aims to celebrate the brand's new offerings and connect with consumers on a global scale.

data.title: StubHub (NYSE: STUB) to report Q4 and full year 2025 financial results on March 4, 2026 after US stock market closes. Live audio webcast available at investors.stubhub.com.
data.description: In New York, StubHub Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: STUB) will be releasing its financial results for Q4 and full-year 2025 on March 4, 2026, following the close of the U.S. stock market. The company, a prominent global ticketing marketplace for live events, is set to conduct a conference call and webcast on the same day at 5:00 PM ET to delve into the figures. For those interested, the live audio webcast can be accessed on StubHub's investor relations website at investors.stubhub.com. A replay of the event will also be available.
The U.S. government has proposed banning U.S. government agencies from using products made by certain Chinese semiconductor companies, including SMIC and CXMT.

data.title: Sterling Infrastructure, Inc. set to release Q4 2025 financial results on Feb 25, 2026, after market close. $STRL.
data.description: Today in The Woodlands, Texas, Sterling Infrastructure, Inc. (NasdaqGS: STRL) revealed its intention to release the financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025 on Wednesday, February 25, 2026, post the stock market closure.

data.title: First Bank's CEO, Adam Currie, elected Director of Federal Reserve Bank of Richmond. Brings 20 years of experience.
data.description: In Southern Pines, North Carolina, on February 13, 2026, First Bank happily reported that Adam Currie, the President and CEO of the bank, was chosen as a Class A Director of the Federal Reserve Bank of Richmond. With more than two decades of experience in financial services, Currie's appointment highlights his expertise in the industry.

data.title: OpenAssets launches OpenAgent, an SEC-registered transfer agent for tokenized asset markets. PITTSBURGH, Feb. 13, 2026 - bringing institutional compliance to tokens.
data.description: Today, OpenAssets unveiled OpenAgent in Pittsburgh, marking the launch of a unique SEC-registered transfer agent tailored for tokenized asset markets. This innovative on-chain transfer agent enhances institutional compliance within the market. The launch on Feb. 13, 2026, introduces a ground-breaking solution to address regulatory requirements for such assets, setting a new standard. This development signifies a significant step towards ensuring seamless operations within burgeoning tokenized markets.

data.title: NYSE celebrates Black History Month by ringing opening bell. Daily pre-market advisory from NYSE Trading Floor. Feb. 13, 2026.
data.description: In a report dated February 13, 2026, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) releases a daily pre-market advisory straight from the NYSE Trading Floor. This service offers valuable market insights before trading commences, giving investors an edge in their decision-making. This resource provides crucial information for traders to stay informed about the current market conditions. Don't miss out on today's NYSE Pre-market update to leverage this essential information for successful trading.
SMOKING UP, DRINKING DOWN Tobacco and smoking products jumped 2.1% — the biggest rise since 2017 — while at-home alcohol fell 0.4%, the sharpest drop since 2019.

data.title: Expedia CFO sees dynamic economy, lowers margin expectations. Revenue up 11% to $3.55 billion, stock drops 7%.
data.description: Expedia Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: EXPE) experienced a decrease in stock price despite reporting impressive fourth-quarter results. The company surpassed expectations with revenue increasing by 11% year over year to $3.55 billion, beating the estimated $3.419 billion. Adjusted EBITDA also rose by 32% year over year to $848, with EBITDA margin expanding by 368 bps year over year to 23.9% in Q4. Additionally, adjusted EPS saw a significant surge of 58% year over year to $3.78, exceeding the projected $3.33. Expedia also displayed strong performance by posting double-digit booking growth, enhancing its dividend, and repurchasing $1.7 billion in stock. However, despite these positive outcomes, the stock faced a nearly 7% decline in premarket trading as cautious guidance for 2026 indicated a more reserved outlook. For more details, refer to the full story available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Intensity Therapeutics will undergo a reverse stock split, with trading expected to start on Feb. 19, 2026, under the Nasdaq symbol INTS.
data.description: Intensity Therapeutics, Inc. is a late-stage clinical biotechnology company that will see its common stock start trading on a post-split adjusted basis from February 19, 2026. The company, listed as Nasdaq: INTS, is based in SHELTON, Conn. This development marks a significant step for the company as it continues to progress in its field.
